text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Fine Motion makes it through the Shuka Sho! And
the spectators go wild seeing her have so much
fun running.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
At the press conference following the race, she
announces that she'll be heading for the Queen
Elizabeth II Cup next, earning herself even more
attention.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
However, an Umamusume whose very name
proclaims majesty—Kawakami
Princess—challenges the royal descendant Fine
Motion! A dramatic showdown between the
"princesses" draws near!
